بُنِيَ الإِسْلَامُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ: شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ، وَإِقَامِ الصَّلَاةِ، وَإِيتَاءِ الزَّكَاةِ، وَالْحَجِّ، وَصَوْمِ رَمَضَانَ
Buniya al-Islāmu 'alā khamsin: shahādati an lā ilāha illallāhu wa anna Muhammadan rasūlullāhi, wa iqāmi aṣ-ṣalāti, wa ītā'i az-zakāti, wa al-ḥajji, wa ṣawmi ramaḍān

Islam is built upon five pillars: testifying that there is no god but Allah and that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah, performing the prayers, paying the Zakat, making the pilgrimage to the House, and fasting in Ramadan.
لاَ يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى أَكُونَ أَحَبَّ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ وَالِدِهِ وَوَلَدِهِ وَالنَّاسِ أَجْمَعِينَ
Lā yu'minu aḥadukum ḥattā akūna aḥabba ilayhi min wālidihi wa waladihi wa an-nāsi ajma'īn
None of you will have faith till he loves me more than his father, his children and all mankind.
أَفْضَلُ الإِسْلَامِ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
Afḍalu al-islāmi man salima al-muslimūna min lisānihi wa yadihi
The best of Muslims is the one from whose tongue and hand other Muslims are safe.
الإِيمَانُ بِضْعٌ وَسِتُّونَ شُعْبَةً، وَالْحَيَاءُ شُعْبَةٌ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
Al-īmānu biḍ'un wa sittūna shu'bah, wal-ḥayā'u shu'batun mina al-īmān
Faith consists of more than sixty branches, and modesty is a branch of faith.
